behaviors.description: Block storing a PASS summary when any stored finding in the same review round has verdict FAIL.
behaviors.justification: Failure is at a module boundary: summary-persistence logic must query stored per-dimension findings and enforce a cross-record invariant (MOCK-MISS=yes). No real OS/network/subprocess is required (REAL-INFRA=no). No dependence on LLM output quality (LLM-DEP=no). Not a multi-agent sequence (MULTI-STEP=no). Rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is strictly about stored findings vs summary write gate, which is enforceable with in-process wiring and local persistence.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository against a test DB. Seed one round with at least one FAIL dimension finding, attempt to store PASS summary, assert write is rejected and error references conflicting finding(s).

behaviors.description: Compute stop-gate verdict from stored per-dimension findings, not only summary free text.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module read-path correctness: gate computation must consume repository findings rather than summary text (MOCK-MISS=yes). Real infrastructure is not needed; local in-process store suffices (REAL-INFRA=no). No model-output dependence (LLM-DEP=no). No multi-agent chain required (MULTI-STEP=no). Rejected Unit because bug appears only when gate and storage/query modules are wired together.
behaviors.test_description: Seed repository with findings containing FAIL and a contradictory summary text saying PASS. Run stop-gate computation and assert result is non-PASS based on stored findings, with proof summary text was ignored as decision source.

behaviors.description: Require explicit override flag for manual summary overrides and emit an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: Behavior spans request handling, authorization/flag validation, and audit logging persistence (MOCK-MISS=yes). No real OS/network/subprocess needed (REAL-INFRA=no). No AI-output dependence (LLM-DEP=no). Not multi-agent sequencing (MULTI-STEP=no). Rejected Unit because enforcing both gate condition and durable audit side effect is a module interaction invariant.
behaviors.test_description: Run override attempt without flag and assert rejection. Run with explicit override flag and assert summary write succeeds only with a persisted warning/audit record containing actor, round, timestamp, and reason.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, PASS finalization requires a review round ID generated after the latest fix commit.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is state handoff between fix-tracking (latest commit) and review-round metadata gating PASS (MOCK-MISS=yes). This can be validated with deterministic commit/review metadata in local store (REAL-INFRA=no). No dependence on model judgment content (LLM-DEP=no). Sequence is temporal but not multiple real agentic decisions (MULTI-STEP=no). Rejected System because behavior text does not require real git subprocess semantics, only ordering constraint between stored commit and round identifiers.
behaviors.test_description: Seed fix commit A then review round R1 tied to pre-fix commit, attempt PASS finalize and assert block. Seed newer review round R2 tied to commit A (or later), assert PASS can proceed only with R2 identifier.

behaviors.description: In live review loop, PASS cannot finalize until a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real review-agent round in live loop; if the agent call is mocked, the system can appear compliant while skipping true fresh-agent execution under updated diff conditions (MOCK-HIDE=yes, LLM-DEP default applies because execution path includes real AI call). Not Workflow because this behavior requires one fresh round, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence (MULTI-STEP=no). Rejected Integration due behavior text 'live review loop' + 'review-agent round runs' disqualifying purely stubbed verification.
behaviors.test_description: Run end-to-end live loop: create updated diff after fixes, attempt PASS before rerun (must fail), then execute a real review-agent round on updated diff and assert PASS gate only unlocks after that round is recorded as fresh.

behaviors.description: When rounds are exhausted and stored results still contain unresolved MUST-FIX findings, outcome is escalation, not PASS.
behaviors.justification: Decision depends on combining round-limit state with stored findings severity, a cross-module invariant in deterministic orchestration (MOCK-MISS=yes). No real OS/network/subprocess required (REAL-INFRA=no). Behavior text says 'stored results' and does not require judging model output quality (LLM-DEP=no). No required multi-agent chain for this specific assertion (MULTI-STEP=no). Rejected Agentic/Workflow because disqualifying text is 'in stored results' and outcome rule is deterministic on persisted statuses.
behaviors.test_description: Seed round counter at exhaustion and findings including unresolved MUST-FIX. Execute gate decision and assert escalation state is emitted and PASS is denied.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings must still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is explicitly about a live multi-round workflow, i.e., sequential review rounds with carryover state and final gating. Real failure appears in cross-step handoff over multiple rounds; single-step tests can miss it (MULTI-STEP=yes). Because rounds are review-agent rounds, at least one model-driven step governs state progression, so Integration is too low by the integration-brake rule for LLM-involved staged handoff. Rejected Agentic (single-step) due disqualifying text 'multi-round review workflow' requiring sequence-level validation.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full live pipeline across multiple rounds on evolving diffs until round budget is exhausted; keep at least one MUST-FIX unresolved in stored findings. Assert final outcome remains non-PASS and escalation event is emitted at workflow end.
